story.text: A workshop in which a new first person authors their own little book of poetry and proverbs — their own story off a shared root — and a portable, machine-readable context their agent can carry and reconstitute on any system. This is the **First Person Spellbook**.

## Start here

- [[Start Here]] — the single on-ramp
- [[The Invitation]] · [[Onboarding and Canon Links]] · [[The FPSP Protocol]]

## The seven-step build (the agent commands, in order)

- [[The Workshop]] — the hub
- [[Step 1 — Copy the Narrative]]
- [[Step 2 — The Facilitated Conversation]]
- [[Step 3 — Write Your 31 Acts]]
- [[Step 4 — Compress into Proverbs]]
- [[Step 5 — Spells and Your Patch]]
- [[Step 6 — Glyph and Bind]]
- [[Step 7 — Weave the Mouse Book]]

## Read all the narratives

- [[The 31 Acts]] — the canon index (First Page · Act 01–31 · Last Page · Inscriptions)

## The shelf

- [[The Spell-Emoji Legend]] · [[Canon Sources]] · [[Canon of Research]] · [[The Narrative Packet]] · [[The Constellation Track]]
- [[The Templates]] · [[The Chronicles]] · [[The Grimoire Root]]
